Shielded Mobile Platform

DOĞUŞ Op-Mobil-DOĞUŞ MOBILE OPERATIONAL VEHICLE

Doğuş Op-Mobil is designed and  developed for the security forces against urban centric terrorist activities, uprising and vandalism.  In this design of Dogus Op-Mobil (Dogu Mobile Operational Vehicle) composite ballistic shielding wings are mounted on a hydraulically moving platforms to protect the security forces.  Iis designed to be used against narrow street urban vandalism and hologanism along with terrorist activities.  It has the maximum movement ability for all the directions with its composite protection wings with the ease of operation to open and close based on the needs and necessities.  It may have a transparent viewing window made of ALP01 composite glass and it may also carry many other accesories for handling an effective operation.

Figure 8: “DOĞUŞ OpMobil”: Operational ballistically
protected urban vehicle for security forces
